title: Template Manifest Family Skeleton
description: Skeleton only. Phase 1 Step 1 scaffold for the template-manifest family — outermost wrapper carrying template identity, version, family, owner, source-traceability, and global MVP status metadata. Not fully populated. Full extraction occurs in later Phase 1 steps (Phase 1 Step 2 — Enum and Validation Rule Extraction; Phase 1 Step 3 — Object Family Field Consolidation; Phase 1 Step 4 — Per-Family Schema Population). Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §4.
